rulings.Case Title: HAROLD DEMOSS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Honeywell International Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition, And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR THURSDAY, MAY 20, 2010 IN DEPARTMENT 220 AT 9:00 AM, LINE 1. Plaintiffs' motion to compel defendant Honeywell to produce deponent(s) and documents is continued to May 27 to provide the parties with additional time to meet and confer. If all the issues on the motion are not resolved before then, by 4pm on May 26 each party, without further argument, should send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating the remaining issue or issues in dispute and appear for the hearing on May 27. = (220/HEK)
